title: cyclophyllum longiflorum
intro: Cyclophyllum longiflorum, a flowering plant species native to Madagascar, belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is commonly known as the 'Long-Flowered Tree'. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Cyclophyllum longiflorum are numerous, with potential uses in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as skin and wound infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
